main.description: Apply a peer-moderation label to a community post. Caller must be in PEER_MOD_DIDS. Forwards the action to Ozone (modEventLabel createLabelVals) and persists attribution in peer_mod_labels.

subjectUri.description: AT URI of the community post being labeled.

subjectCid.description: CID of the community post version this label applies to.

reason.description: Optional explanation recorded with the Ozone event.

errors.name: PeerModRequired
errors.description: The caller is not in the peer-moderator allowlist.

errors.name: InvalidSubject
errors.description: Subject is not a community.blacksky.feed.post URI or does not exist.

errors.name: OzoneFailed
errors.description: Ozone rejected the modEventLabel call; nothing was persisted.
